'''Gold 6''' was the designation of a [[BTL-A4 Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL-A4 Y-wing]] in service to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. [[Pilot/Legends|Piloted]] by [[Hol Okand/Legends|Hol Okand]], the [[Starfighter/Legends|fighter]] led an [[Attack on the Kashyyyk outpost|attack]] against an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] outpost at [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="CCG-Gold6" /> Okand led the attack with [[Jon Vander/Legends|Jon Vander]] as his [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]],<ref name="CCG-Okand">{{CCG|set=Special Edition Limited|cardname=Hol Okand}}</ref> disabling the outposts [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] with his fighter's [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]].<ref name="CCG-Gold6" />

Gold 6 was transferred to the [[Great Temple/Legends|Great Temple]] as part of [[Gold Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gold Squadron]].<ref name="ANH" /> Okand piloted the fighter against the Empire during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].<ref name="CCG-Gold6" />
